enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Due diligence requirements with respect to LSPs
(1) Digital lending by a bank involving a LSP, shall be carried out under a
contractual agreement between the bank and the LSP, which clearly defines
the respective roles, rights, and obligations of each party thereto.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

capabilities, robustness of data privacy policies and storage systems, fairness

all applicable regulations and statutes.

inclusion is not misrepresented in any marketing, promotional, or other
materials issued by or on behalf of the DLAs.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility as Default Loss Guarantee (DLG) provider
A bank may enter into DLG arrangements only with a LSP / other lender engaged
as an LSP.
enriched_requirements.object: only with a LSP / other lender engaged as an LSP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the LSP providing DLG shall be incorporated as a company
under the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: company under the Companies Act, 2013

conditions: if any, payable to / received by the DLG provider
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Due diligence and other requirements with respect to DLG provider
(1) A bank, including a bank acting as DLG provider, shall lay down, as part of its
policy, the eligibility criteria for DLG provider, nature and extent of DLG cover,
process of monitoring and reviewing the DLG arrangement, and the details of
the fees, if any, payable to / received by the DLG provider, as the case may
be, before entering into any DLG arrangement.
enriched_requirements.object: of its policy, the eligibility criteria for DLG provider, nature and extent of DLG cover, process of monitoring and reviewing the DLG arrangement, and the details of the fees

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall ensure that any DLG arrangement does not act as a substitute for
credit appraisal requirements and robust credit underwriting standards need to
be put in place irrespective of the DLG cover.
enriched_requirements.object: arrangement does not act as a substitute for credit appraisal requirements and robust credit underwriting standards need to be put

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) Every time a bank enters into or renews a DLG arrangement, it shall obtain
adequate information to satisfy itself that the entity extending DLG would be
able to honour it.
enriched_requirements.object: satisfy itself that the entity extending DLG would be able to honour it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such information shall, at a minimum, include a declaration
from the DLG provider, certified by the statutory auditor of the DLG provider,
on the aggregate DLG amount outstanding, the number of lenders and the
respective number of portfolios against which DLG has been provided.
enriched_requirements.object: include a declaration from the DLG provider, certified by the statutory auditor of the DLG provider, on the aggregate DLG amount outst

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
declaration shall also contain past default rates on similar portfolios.
enriched_requirements.object: rates on similar portfolios

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Restrictions on entering into DLG arrangements
(1) A bank shall not enter into DLG arrangements for revolving credit facilities
offered through digital lending channel and credit cards as defined under
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Cards and Debit Cards:
Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: for revolving credit facilities offered through digital lending channel and credit cards as defined under Reserve Bank of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank shall not enter into DLG arrangements on the loans which are
covered by the credit guarantee schemes administered by trust funds as
specified under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms
on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: on the loans which are covered by the credit guarantee schemes administered by trust funds as specified under Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Structure of DLG arrangements
DLG arrangements shall be backed by an explicit and legally enforceable contract
between the bank and the DLG provider.
enriched_requirements.object: explicit and legally enforceable contract between the bank and the DLG provider

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such contract, among other things, shall
contain the following details:
(1) Extent of DLG cover.
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Extent of DLG cover

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Forms of DLG
A bank shall accept DLG only in one or more of the following forms:
(1) Cash deposited with the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: one or more of the following forms: (1) Cash deposited with the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Cap on DLG
(1) A bank shall ensure that the total amount of DLG cover on any outstanding
portfolio which is specified upfront shall not exceed five per cent of the total
amount disbursed out of that loan portfolio at any given time.
enriched_requirements.object: of the total amount disbursed out of that loan portfolio at any given time

conditions:
In case of implicit
guarantee arrangements
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of implicit
guarantee arrangements, the DLG Provider shall not bear performance risk of
more than the equivalent amount of five per cent of the underlying loan
portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: more than the equivalent amount of five per cent of the underlying loan portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The portfolio over which DLG can be offered shall consist of identifiable and
measurable loan assets which have been sanctioned (the 'DLG set').
enriched_requirements.object: measurable loan assets which have been sanctioned (the 'DLG set')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This
portfolio shall remain fixed for the purpose of DLG cover and is not meant to
be dynamic.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of DLG cover and is not meant to be dynamic

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This
portfolio shall remain "frozen" for the purpose of the specific DLG arrangement
- meaning that no loan assets can be added or removed from it, except through
loan repayment/ write-off.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of the specific DLG arrangement - meaning that no loan assets can be added or removed from it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The ceiling for DLG cover on such portfolio shall be fixed at ₹2 crore (5 per
cent of ₹40 crore), which shall get activated proportionately as and when the
loans are disbursed.
enriched_requirements.object: crore (5 per cent of ₹40 crore), which shall get activated proportionately as and when the loans are disbursed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Then as on April 1, 2024, the DLG cover available for
the portfolio shall be ₹0.5 crore (5 per cent of disbursed).

Subsequently, if loans of ₹10 crore are further disbursed on April 15, 2024, the
DLG cover shall proportionately increase to ₹1 crore effective April 15, 2024.
enriched_requirements.object: crore effective April 15, 2024

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this case, the outstanding portfolio in the books of the bank would be ₹15
crore and the DLG cover shall remain at ₹1 crore.

In this
case, as of Sept 30, 2024 the outstanding portfolio in the books of the bank
shall be ₹15 crore (₹20 crore original portfolio less ₹5 crore loans matured
without default) but no headroom for DLG will be available as the maximum
permissible DLG cover of ₹1 crore (5 per cent of disbursed) has been
exhausted.
enriched_requirements.object: crore original portfolio less ₹5 crore loans matured without default) but no headroom for DLG will be available as the maximum permi

In such a
case, the amount of the outstanding portfolio in the books of the bank as on
October 31, 2024 shall come down to ₹14 crore (₹20 crore original portfolio
less ₹5 crore loans matured without any default less ₹1 crore loans which were
in default and recovered).
enriched_requirements.object: crore (₹20 crore original portfolio less ₹5 crore loans matured without any default less ₹1 crore loans which were in default and rec

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Recognition of NPA
(1) Recognition of individual loan assets in the portfolio as Non-Performing Asset
(NPA) and consequent provisioning shall be the responsibility of the bank as
per the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Income Recognition,
Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025 irrespective of any DLG
cover available at the portfolio level.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank as per the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Dire

<image>
(2) The amount of DLG invoked shall not be set off against the underlying
individual loans, i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: the underlying individual loans, i

the liability of the borrowers in respect of the underlying
loan shall remain unaffected.

(4) DLG amount once invoked by the bank shall not be reinstated, including
through loan recovery.
enriched_requirements.object: loan recovery

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of DLG for regulatory capital
(1) Capital computation, i.e., computation of exposure and application of Credit
Risk Mitigation benefits on individual loan assets in the portfolio shall continue
to be governed by the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: by the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In case, DLG provider is a bank, it shall deduct full amount of the DLG which is
outstanding from its capital.
enriched_requirements.object: the DLG which is outstanding from its capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Invocation and tenor of DLG
(1) A bank shall invoke DLG within a maximum overdue period of 120 days, unless
the loan dues are made good by the borrower before that.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum overdue period of 120 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The period for which the DLG agreement remains in force shall not be less than
the longest tenor of the loan in the underlying loan portfolio.
enriched_requirements.object: longest tenor of the loan in the underlying loan portfolio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Disclosure requirements
(1) The bank shall put in place a mechanism to ensure that LSPs with whom they
have a DLG arrangement shall publish on their website the total number of
portfolios and the respective amount of each portfolio on which DLG has been
offered.
enriched_requirements.object: mechanism to ensure that LSPs with whom they have a DLG arrangement shall publish on their website the total number of portfolios and t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The name of the lender(s) may or may not be disclosed as part of
disclosure under this provision.
enriched_requirements.object: disclosed as part of disclosure under this provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Disclosure under paragraph (1) above shall be made on a monthly basis, with
the disclosure for any given month to be provided no later than seven working
days following the conclusion of that month.
enriched_requirements.object: monthly basis, with the disclosure for any given month to be provided no later than seven working days following the conclusion of that m

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Exceptions
Guarantees covered under the following schemes / entities shall not be covered
within the definition of DLG:
(1) Guarantee schemes of Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small
Enterprises (CGTMSE), Credit Risk Guarantee Fund Trust for Low Income
Housing (CRGFTLIH) and individual schemes under National Credit
Guarantee Trustee Company Ltd (NCGTC).
enriched_requirements.object: definition of DLG: (1) Guarantee schemes of Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE), Credit Risk Gu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such transactions shall not be covered under this
Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However other loan products offered on Credit Cards which are not
covered / envisaged under the aforesaid Directions shall be governed by the
stipulations laid down under this Chapter.
enriched_requirements.object: stipulations laid down under this Chapter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, this Chapter shall also be
applicable to all loans offered on Debit Card, including EMI programmes.
enriched_requirements.object: all loans offered on Debit Card, including EMI programmes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
DLG arrangements entered between a bank and their LSP conforming to the
instructions laid down in this Chapter shall neither be treated as "synthetic
securitisation" as defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Securitisation Transactions) Directions, 2025, nor attract the provisions of 'loan

Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: "synthetic securitisation" as defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Securitisation Transactions) Direction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of
paragraph 5 of these Directions, shall include, inter alia, appropriate single
borrower limits and aggregate limits for the portfolio of loans against collateral of
jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collateral" for this
Chapter);
enriched_requirements.object: single borrower limits and aggregate limits for the portfolio of loans against collateral of jewellery, ornaments or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also include appropriate documentation to
be obtained and maintained for loans proposed to be categorised under priority
sector lending.
enriched_requirements.object: to be obtained and maintained for loans proposed to be categorised under priority sector lending

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank may decide on a suitable approach for lending against eligible collateral as
enriched_requirements.object: approach for lending against eligible collateral as

However,
detailed credit assessment, including assessment of borrower's repayment
capacity shall be undertaken in case the total loan amount against eligible
collateral is above ₹2.5 lakh to a borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the total loan amount against eligible collateral is above ₹2

Provided that in case of Bullet repayment loans, the threshold loan amount for
detailed credit assessment shall be the total amount payable at maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: payable at maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may renew an existing loan or sanction a top-up loan upon a formal request
from the borrower, subject to a credit assessment in accordance with paragraph
enriched_requirements.object: or sanction a top-up loan upon a formal request from the borrower

Such renewal or top-up shall be permitted only within the permissible LTV, and
provided the loan is classified as standard.
enriched_requirements.object: the permissible LTV, and provided the loan is classified as standard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, renewal of bullet repayment
loan shall be allowed only after payment of accrued interest, if any.
enriched_requirements.object: payment of accrued interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall
ensure that such renewals and top-ups are clearly identifiable in its Core Banking
System or Loan Processing System.
enriched_requirements.object: and top-ups are clearly identifiable in its Core Banking System or Loan Processing System

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not grant any advance or loan:
(1) For purchase of gold in any form including primary gold, ornaments, jewellery,
or coins, or for purchase of financial assets backed by gold, e.g., units of
Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) or units of Mutual Funds;
enriched_requirements.object: loan: (1) For purchase of gold in any form including primary gold, ornaments, jewellery, or coins, or for purchase of financial a

Provided that a bank may extend need-based working capital finance to
borrowers who use gold or silver as a raw material or as an input in their

also be accepted as security.
enriched_requirements.object: need-based working capital finance to borrowers who use gold or silver as a raw material or as an input in their manufacturing or industrial processing activity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank extending such finance shall ensure that
borrowers do not acquire or hold gold for investment or speculative purposes.
enriched_requirements.object: not acquire or hold gold for investment or speculative purposes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall not extend a loan where ownership of the collateral is doubtful.

A
suitable document or declaration shall be obtained from the borrower in all cases

Multiple
or frequent sanction of loans against eligible collateral to the same borrower,
aggregating to a value in excess of a threshold to be decided by the lender, must
be examined closely as part of the transaction monitoring under the anti-money
laundering (AML) framework.
enriched_requirements.object: part of the transaction monitoring under the anti-money laundering (AML) framework

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall not:
(1) Avail loans by re-pledging gold or silver pledged to it by its borrowers.
enriched_requirements.object: by re-pledging gold or silver pledged to it by its borrowers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Tenor of consumption loans in the nature of bullet repayment loans shall be
capped at 12 months, which may be renewed in terms of paragraph 35.
enriched_requirements.object: months, which may be renewed in terms of paragraph 35

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loans against ornaments and coins shall be subject to the following:
(1) The aggregate weight of ornaments pledged for all loans to a borrower shall

ornaments.
enriched_requirements.object: following: (1) The aggregate weight of ornaments pledged for all loans to a borrower shall not exceed 1 kilogram for gold ornaments,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The aggregate weight of coin(s) pledged for all loans to a borrower shall not
exceed 50 grams in case of gold coins, and 500 grams in case of silver coins.
enriched_requirements.object: case of gold coins, and 500 grams in case of silver coins

Gold or silver accepted as collateral shall be valued based on the reference price
corresponding to its actual purity (caratage).
enriched_requirements.object: the reference price corresponding to its actual purity (caratage)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the lower of
(1) the average closing price for gold or silver, as the case may be, of that specific

the preceding day, as published either by the India Bullion and Jewellers
Association Ltd.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(IBJA) or by a commodity exchange regulated by the
Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) shall be used.

If price information for the specific purity is not directly available, the lender shall
use the published price available for the nearest available purity and
proportionately adjust the weight of the collateral based on its actual purity to arrive
at valuation.
enriched_requirements.object: available for the nearest available purity and proportionately adjust the weight of the collateral based on its actual purity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

Total consumption loan
Maximum LTV ratio
amount per borrower
≤ ₹2.5 lakh 85 per cent

The prescribed LTV ratio shall be maintained on an ongoing basis throughout the

For conduct related aspects and collateral management, the bank shall be guided

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall generally disburse loans into borrower's bank accounts.

shall comply with the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your

enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provisions of Sections 269 SS and 269 T of the

Consequently, such

enriched_requirements.object: instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All collateral-free loans, irrespective of end use and mode of application /
processing / disbursal (either through physical or digital channels), provided to low-
income households, i.e., households having annual income up to ₹3,00,000 shall
be considered as microfinance loans.
enriched_requirements.object: loans

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: To ensure collateral-free nature of the microfinance loan, the loan
shall not be linked with a lien on the deposit account of the borrower or backed by
hypothecation of any security.
enriched_requirements.object: lien on the deposit account of the borrower or backed by hypothecation of any security

Each bank shall put in place a board-approved policy for assessment of household
income.

Indicative methodology for assessment of household income is outlined

(1) For undertaking the income assessment of a low-income household,
information related to following parameters may be captured by the lender:

The banks

Each bank shall mandatorily submit information regarding household income to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Each bank shall have a board-approved policy regarding the limit on the outflows

percentage of the monthly household income.
enriched_requirements.object: regarding the limit on the outflows on account of repayment of monthly loan obligations of a household as a percentage of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The limit on the outflows on account
of repayment of monthly loan obligations of a household shall be limited to a
maximum 50 per cent of the monthly household income.
enriched_requirements.object: maximum 50 per cent of the monthly household income

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Any future expected income from the asset/ activity financed by a
microfinance loan shall not be included in the household income for the purpose
of calculating the indebtedness of the household.
enriched_requirements.object: household income for the purpose of calculating the indebtedness of the household

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

enriched_requirements.object: outstanding loans (collateral-free microfinance loans as well as any other type of collateralized loans) of the household

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The outflows capped at 50 per cent of the

consideration.
enriched_requirements.object: principal as well as interest component) towards all existing loans as well as the loan under consideration

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Existing loans, for which outflows on account of repayment of monthly loan
obligations of a household as a percentage of the monthly household income
exceed the limit of 50 per cent, shall be allowed to mature.

However, in such cases,
no new loans shall be provided to these households till the prescribed limit of 50
per cent is complied with.
enriched_requirements.object: households till the prescribed limit of 50 per cent is complied with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

A bank shall ensure that all applicable approvals / clearances for implementing /

public sector undertakings which are not registered under Companies Act

run on commercial lines, and the Government is interested in promoting the

B.5.1.

enriched_requirements.object: exporter maintains account with the same bank or it has the approval of the members of the consortium

conditions:
In case of cancellation of the export order for which the PCFC was availed of
by the exporter from the bank

if the exporter is unable to execute the export
order for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of cancellation of the export order for which the PCFC was availed of
by the exporter from the bank, or if the exporter is unable to execute the export
order for any reason, the exporter may repay the loan together with accrued
interest thereon, by purchasing foreign exchange (principal + interest) from
domestic market through the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: with accrued interest thereon, by purchasing foreign exchange (principal + interest) from domestic market through the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also be in order for the bank to remit the amount to the overseas bank,
provided the PCFC was made available to exporter from the line of credit obtained
from that bank.
enriched_requirements.object: for the bank to remit the amount to the overseas bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall extend PCFC to such exporters subsequently, after ensuring
that the earlier cancellation of PCFC was due to genuine reasons.
enriched_requirements.object: exporters subsequently, after ensuring that the earlier cancellation of PCFC was due to genuine reasons

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall extend the 'Running Account' facility under the PCFC Scheme
to exporters for all commodities, on the lines of the facility available under rupee
credit, subject to the following conditions:
(1) The facility shall be extended provided the need for 'Running Account' facility
has been established by the exporters to the satisfaction of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: facility under the PCFC Scheme to exporters for all commodities, on the lines of the facility available under rupee credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank shall extend the facility only to those exporters whose track record
has been good.
enriched_requirements.object: to those exporters whose track record has been good

conditions:
where pre-shipment credit 'Running Account' facility has been
extended
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In all cases, where pre-shipment credit 'Running Account' facility has been
extended, the LCs or firm orders shall be produced within a reasonable period
of time.
enriched_requirements.object: reasonable period of time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (4) The PCFC shall be marked-off on the 'First-in-First-Out' basis.
enriched_requirements.object: 'First-in-First-Out' basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) PCFC shall also be marked-off with proceeds of export documents against
which no PCFC has been drawn by the exporter.
enriched_requirements.object: proceeds of export documents against which no PCFC has been drawn by the exporter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall closely monitor the production of firm order or LC subsequently
by exporters and also the end-use of funds.
enriched_requirements.object: of firm order or LC subsequently by exporters and also the end-use of funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that no diversion
of funds is made for domestic use.
enriched_requirements.object: diversion of funds is made for domestic use

conditions:
In case of non-utilisation of PCFC drawals for
<image>
export purposes
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of non-utilisation of PCFC drawals for
<image>
export purposes, the penal provisions stated above shall be made applicable and
the 'Running Account' facility shall be withdrawn for the concerned exporter.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'Running Account' facility shall be withdrawn for the concerned exporter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall take any prepayment by the exporter under PCFC scheme
within their foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL) as indicated
in paragraph 300(3) of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the exporter under PCFC scheme within their foreign exchange position and Aggregate Gap Limit (AGL) as indicated in paragraph 3

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall charge the exporters the funding cost, if any, involved in
absorbing mismatches in respect of the prepayment beyond one month period.
enriched_requirements.object: funding cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also allow an exporter to book forward
contract on the basis of confirmed export order prior to availing of PCFC and
cancel the contract (for portion of drawal used for imported inputs) at prevailing
market rates on availing of PCFC.
enriched_requirements.object: to book forward contract on the basis of confirmed export order prior to availing of PCFC and cancel the contract (for portion

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall allow customers to seek cover in any permitted currency of their
choice which is actively traded in the market, subject to ensuring that the customer
is exposed to exchange risk in a permitted currency in the underlying transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: cover in any permitted currency of their choice which is actively traded in the market

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
While allowing forward contracts under the scheme, banks shall ensure
compliance of the basic Foreign Exchange Management requirement that the
customer is exposed to an exchange risk in the underlying transaction at different
stages of the export finance.
enriched_requirements.object: basic Foreign Exchange Management requirement that the customer is exposed to an exchange risk in the underlying transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rupee export packing credit may be shared between an export order holder
and the manufacturer of the goods to be exported.
enriched_requirements.object: export order holder and the manufacturer of the goods to be exported

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, the bank shall extend
PCFC also to the manufacturer on the basis of the disclaimer from the export order
holder through its bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the manufacturer on the basis of the disclaimer from the export order holder through its bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank shall ensure that no double financing is involved in the transaction and the
<image>
total period of packing credit is limited to the actual cycle of production of the
exported goods.
enriched_requirements.object: financing is involved in the transaction and the <image> total period of packing credit is limited to the actual cycle of produc

conditions:
where the banker or the leader of consortium of
banks is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility shall be extended where the banker or the leader of consortium of
banks is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or, the
banks concerned agree to such an arrangement where the bankers are different
for export order holder and manufacturer.
enriched_requirements.object: banker or the leader of consortium of banks is the same for both the export order holder and the manufacturer or, the banks conc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sharing of export benefits shall be
left to the mutual agreement between the export order holder and the
manufacturer.
enriched_requirements.object: mutual agreement between the export order holder and the manufacturer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall be made available to both, the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit and
the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: both, the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit and the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCFC for supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit shall be for supply of raw materials
/ components of goods which will be further processed and finally exported by
receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: raw materials / components of goods which will be further processed and finally exported by receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The PCFC extended to the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit shall have to be
liquidated by receipt of foreign exchange from the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit,
for which purpose, the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit may avail of PCFC.
enriched_requirements.object: by receipt of foreign exchange from the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit, for which purpose, the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit may

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The stipulation regarding liquidation of PCFC by payment in foreign exchange
shall be met in such cases not by negotiation of export documents but by transfer
of foreign exchange from the banker of the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit to the
banker of supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit.
enriched_requirements.object: cases not by negotiation of export documents but by transfer of foreign exchange from the banker of the receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, there shall not normally be any
post-shipment credit in the transaction from the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit's
point of view.
enriched_requirements.object: credit in the transaction from the supplier EOU / EPZ / SEZ unit's point of view

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In all such cases, it shall be ensured by banks that there is no double financing
for the same transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: that there is no double financing for the same transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Needless to add, the PCFC to receiver EOU / EPZ / SEZ
unit shall be liquidated by discounting of export bills.
enriched_requirements.object: of export bills

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall be allowed for 'deemed exports' only for supplies to projects
financed by multilateral / bilateral agencies / funds.
enriched_requirements.object: exports' only for supplies to projects financed by multilateral / bilateral agencies / funds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC released for 'deemed
exports' shall be liquidated by grant of foreign currency loan at post-supply stage,
for a maximum period of 30 days or up to the date of payment by the project
<image>
authorities, whichever is earlier.
enriched_requirements.object: of foreign currency loan at post-supply stage, for a maximum period of 30 days or up to the date of payment by the project <ima

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
PCFC shall also be repaid / prepaid out of
balances in EEFC A/c as also from rupee resources of the exporter to the extent
supplies have actually been made.
enriched_requirements.object: prepaid out of balances in EEFC A/c as also from rupee resources of the exporter to the extent supplies have actually been made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
to the exporters shall accrue only after realisation of the
export bills and not at the stage of conversion of pre-shipment credit to post-
shipment credit (except when bills are discounted / rediscounted 'without
recourse').
enriched_requirements.object: of the export bills and not at the stage of conversion of pre-shipment credit to post- shipment credit (except when bill

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of reckoning the bank's performance in extending export credit,
the rupee equivalent of the PCFC shall be taken into account.

Under the DDA Scheme, the bank shall liquidate PCFC granted to DDA holders
by dollar proceeds from sale of rough, cut and polished diamonds by them to other
DDA holders.
enriched_requirements.object: DDA holders by dollar proceeds from sale of rough, cut and polished diamonds by them to other DDA holders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(For details regarding the Diamond Dollar Accounts, bank may refer
to Foreign Exchange Management (Foreign currency accounts by a person
resident in India) Regulations, 2015, issued by FED vide Notification No.
enriched_requirements.object: Management (Foreign currency accounts by a person resident in India) Regulations, 2015, issued by FED vide Notification No

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall utilise the foreign exchange resources available with it in
Exchange Earners Foreign Currency Accounts (EEFC), Resident Foreign
Currency Accounts (RFC), Foreign Currency (Non-Resident) Accounts (Banks)
Scheme, to discount usance bills and retain them in their portfolio without resorting
<image>
to rediscounting.
enriched_requirements.object: resources available with it in Exchange Earners Foreign Currency Accounts (EEFC), Resident Foreign Currency Accounts (RFC

conditions:
if rediscounting facility on bill-to-bill basis is
arranged by a bank in case of any particular exporter
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall, however, be no bar if rediscounting facility on bill-to-bill basis is
arranged by a bank in case of any particular exporter, especially for large value
transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: bar if rediscounting facility on bill-to-bill basis is arranged by a bank in case of any particular exporter, especially for large va

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall arrange a "Bankers Acceptance Facility" (BAF) for rediscounting
the export bills without any margin and duly covered by collateralised documents.
enriched_requirements.object: Facility" (BAF) for rediscounting the export bills without any margin and duly covered by collateralised documents

conditions: in case of factoring arrangement
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Each bank can have its own BAF limit(s) fixed with an overseas bank or a
rediscounting agency or an arrangement with any other agency such as factoring
agency (in case of factoring arrangement, it shall be on 'without recourse' basis
only).
enriched_requirements.object: basis only)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The exporters, on their own, can arrange for themselves a line of credit with an
overseas bank or any other agency (including a factoring agency) for discounting
their export bills direct subject to the following conditions:
(1) Direct discounting of export bills by exporters with overseas bank and / or any
other agency shall be done only through the branch of an authorized dealer
designated by them for this purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: the branch of an authorized dealer designated by them for this purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Discounting of export bills shall be routed through designated bank / authorized
dealer from whom the packing credit facility has been availed of.
enriched_requirements.object: bank / authorized dealer from whom the packing credit facility has been availed of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The limits granted to banks by overseas banks / discounting agencies under
BAF shall not be reckoned for the purpose of borrowing limits fixed by Foreign
Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank for them.
enriched_requirements.object: purpose of borrowing limits fixed by Foreign Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank for them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Scheme shall cover mainly export bills with usance period up to 180 days
from the date of shipment (inclusive of normal transit period and grace period, if
<image>
any).
enriched_requirements.object: with usance period up to 180 days from the date of shipment (inclusive of normal transit period and grace period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case borrower is eligible to draw usance bills for periods exceeding 180 days
as per the extant instructions of Foreign Exchange Department, Post-shipment
Credit under the EBR shall be provided beyond 180 days.
enriched_requirements.object: days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility under the Scheme of Rediscounting shall be offered in any
convertible currency.
enriched_requirements.object: convertible currency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For operational convenience, the BAF Scheme shall be centralised at a branch
designated by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: branch designated by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
There shall, however, be no bar for other branches of the
bank to operate the scheme as per the bank's internal guidelines / instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: bar for other branches of the bank to operate the scheme as per the bank's internal guidelines / instructions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of demand bills [subject to paragraph 346 of these Directions], these
shall be routed through the existing post-shipment credit facility or by way of
foreign exchange loans to the exporters out of the foreign currency balances
available with banks in the Schemes ibid.
enriched_requirements.object: existing post-shipment credit facility or by way of foreign exchange loans to the exporters out of the foreign currency balances

conditions: in case of need
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of need, the bank shall also have access to the local market,
which will enable the country to save foreign exchange to the extent of the cost of
rediscounting.
enriched_requirements.object: the local market, which will enable the country to save foreign exchange to the extent of the cost of rediscounting

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, as different banks may be having BAF for varying amounts,
it shall be possible for a bank which has balance available in its limit to offer
rediscounting facility to another bank which may have exhausted its limit or could
not arrange for such a facility.
enriched_requirements.object: bank which has balance available in its limit to offer rediscounting facility to another bank which may have exhausted its limit or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall avail of lines of credit from other banks in India if they are not in
a position to raise loans from abroad on their own or they do not have branches
abroad
enriched_requirements.object: credit from other banks in India if they are not in a position to raise loans from abroad on their own or they do not have branches

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also use foreign currency funds borrowed in terms of Notification
No.
enriched_requirements.object: funds borrowed in terms of Notification No

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the bills may be rediscounted 'with
recourse'.

conditions:
if an AD is in a position to arrange 'without recourse' facility
on competitive terms
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, if an AD is in a position to arrange 'without recourse' facility
on competitive terms, it shall avail itself of such a facility.
enriched_requirements.object: a facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rupee equivalent of the discounted value of the export bills shall be payable
to the exporter and the same shall be utilised to liquidate the outstanding export
packing credit.
enriched_requirements.object: exporter and the same shall be utilised to liquidate the outstanding export packing credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As the discounting of bills / extension of foreign exchange loans (DP bills) shall
be in actual foreign exchange, the bank shall apply appropriate spot rate for the
transactions.
enriched_requirements.object: exchange, the bank shall apply appropriate spot rate for the transactions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The rupee equivalents of discounted amounts / foreign exchange loan shall be
held in the bank's books distinct from the existing post-shipment credit accounts.
enriched_requirements.object: bank's books distinct from the existing post-shipment credit accounts

conditions: In case of overdue bills
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of overdue bills, the bank shall charge interest from the due date to the
date of crystallization as per the interest rate policy of the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: due date to the date of crystallization as per the interest rate policy of the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of export bill not being paid, the bank shall remit the amount
equivalent to the value of the bill earlier discounted, to the overseas bank / agency
which had discounted the bill, without the prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: to the value of the bill earlier discounted, to the overseas bank / agency which had discounted the bill, without the prio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As stated in paragraph 355 of these Directions, 'without recourse' facility may
not generally be available.

conditions:
in case of 'with
recourse' facility

if the bills are
rediscounted 'without recourse'
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the restoration of exporter's limits and the
availability of export benefits, such as credit to EEFC accounts, in case of 'with
recourse' facility, shall be effected only on realisation of export proceeds and not
on the date of discounting / rediscounting of the bills, However, if the bills are
rediscounted 'without recourse', the restoration of exporter's limits and availability
of export benefits shall be given effect immediately on rediscounting.
enriched_requirements.object: realisation of export proceeds and not on the date of discounting / rediscounting of the bills, However

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of export bills rediscounted 'with recourse', there shall not be any
change in the existing system of coverage provided by ECGC Ltd as the liability of
the exporter continues till the relative bill is retired / paid.
enriched_requirements.object: the existing system of coverage provided by ECGC Ltd as the liability of the exporter continues till the relative bill is retired / p

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Only the bills rediscounted abroad 'with recourse' basis and outstanding shall
be taken into account for the purpose of export credit performance.
enriched_requirements.object: for the purpose of export credit performance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bills
rediscounted abroad 'without recourse' shall not count for the export credit
performance.
enriched_requirements.object: credit performance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Bills rediscounted 'with recourse' in the domestic market could get reflected
only in the case of the first bank discounting the bills as that bank alone will have
recourse to the exporter and the bank rediscounting shall not reckon the amount
as export credit.
enriched_requirements.object: export credit

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall lay down the criteria for issuing Gold Cards under the scheme
to creditworthy exporters having good track record, including those in MSME
sector.
enriched_requirements.object: for issuing Gold Cards under the scheme to creditworthy exporters having good track record, including those in MSME sector

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall clearly specify the benefits it shall be offering to Gold Card
holders, based on the following salient features of the scheme.
enriched_requirements.object: it shall be offering to Gold Card holders, based on the following salient features of the scheme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All creditworthy exporters, including those in small and medium sectors, with
good track record shall be eligible for issue of Gold Card by the bank as per the
criteria laid down by it.
enriched_requirements.object: of Gold Card by the bank as per the criteria laid down by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The scheme shall not be applicable for exporters placed in Specific Approval
List (SAL) by ECGC or having overdue bills in excess of 10 per cent of the previous
year's turnover.
enriched_requirements.object: placed in Specific Approval List (SAL) by ECGC or having overdue bills in excess of 10 per cent of the previous year's tur

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Gold Card holder exporters, depending on their track record and credit
worthiness, shall be granted better terms of credit including rates of interest than
those extended to other exporters by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of credit including rates of interest than those extended to other exporters by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applications for credit shall be processed at norms simpler and under a process
faster than for other exporters.
enriched_requirements.object: simpler and under a process faster than for other exporters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall clearly specify the benefits it shall be offering to Gold Card
holders.
enriched_requirements.object: it shall be offering to Gold Card holders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The charges schedule and fee-structure in respect of services provided by the
bank to exporters under the Scheme shall be relatively lower than those provided
to other exporters.
enriched_requirements.object: those provided to other exporters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The sanction and renewal of the limits under the Scheme shall be based on a
simplified procedure to be decided by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: simplified procedure to be decided by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Taking into account the anticipated
export turnover and track record of the exporter the bank shall determine need-
based finance with a liberal approach.
enriched_requirements.object: with a liberal approach

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'In-principle' limits shall be sanctioned for a period of three years with a
provision for automatic renewal subject to fulfilment of the terms and conditions of
sanction.
enriched_requirements.object: period of three years with a provision for automatic renewal subject to fulfilment of the terms and conditions of sanction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A stand-by limit of not less than 20 per cent of the assessed limit shall be
additionally made available to facilitate urgent credit needs for executing sudden
orders.
enriched_requirements.object: to facilitate urgent credit needs for executing sudden orders

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of exporters of seasonal commodities, the peak and off-peak
levels shall be appropriately specified.

conditions: In case of unanticipated export orders
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of unanticipated export orders, norms for inventory shall be relaxed,
taking into account the size and nature of the export order.
enriched_requirements.object: account the size and nature of the export order

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Requests from card holders shall be processed quickly by the bank within 25
days / 15 days and seven days for fresh applications / renewal of limits and ad hoc
limits, respectively.
enriched_requirements.object: the bank within 25 days / 15 days and seven days for fresh applications / renewal of limits and ad hoc limits, respectively

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Gold Card holders shall be given preference in the matter of granting of packing
credit in foreign currency.
enriched_requirements.object: the matter of granting of packing credit in foreign currency

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank may consider waiver of collaterals and exemption from the ECGC's
ECIB schemes on the basis of card holder's creditworthiness and track record.
enriched_requirements.object: and exemption from the ECGC's ECIB schemes on the basis of card holder's creditworthiness and track record

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The facility of further value addition to their cards through supplementary
services like ATM, Internet banking, international debit / credit cards may be
decided by the issuing bank.
enriched_requirements.object: issuing bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The applicable rate of interest to be charged under the Gold Card Scheme shall
not be more than the general rate for export credit in the respective bank.
enriched_requirements.object: general rate for export credit in the respective bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In
keeping with the spirit of the Scheme, the bank shall endeavour to provide the best
<image>
rates possible to Gold Card holders on the basis of their rating and past
performance.
enriched_requirements.object: best <image> rates possible to Gold Card holders on the basis of their rating and past performance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Gold Card holders, on the basis of their track record of timely realization of
export bills, shall be considered for issuance of foreign currency credit cards for
meeting urgent payment obligations, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: of foreign currency credit cards for meeting urgent payment obligations, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall ensure that the PCFC requirements of the Gold Card holders
are met by giving them priority over non-export borrowers with regard to granting
loans out of their FCNR(B) funds, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements of the Gold Card holders are met by giving them priority over non-export borrowers with regard to granting loans out

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall consider granting term loans in foreign currency in deserving
cases out of their FCNR(B), RFC, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: in foreign currency in deserving cases out of their FCNR(B), RFC, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions relating to the Gold Card Scheme for Exporters shall be strictly
implemented and the branch level functionaries suitably sensitised in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: the branch level functionaries suitably sensitised in this regard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the bank shall also provide adequate publicity to the Scheme for the
benefit of exporters.
enriched_requirements.object: to the Scheme for the benefit of exporters

conditions: In case of delay in renewal
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of delay in renewal, the sanctioned limits shall be allowed to continue
uninterrupted and urgent requirements of exporters shall be met on ad hoc basis.
enriched_requirements.object: uninterrupted and urgent requirements of exporters shall be met on ad hoc basis

conditions: In case of established exporters having satisfactory track record
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of established exporters having satisfactory track record, the bank shall
consider sanctioning a 'Line of Credit' for a longer period, say, three years, with in-
built flexibility to step-up / step-down the quantum of limits within the overall
assessed outer limits.
enriched_requirements.object: of Credit' for a longer period, say, three years, with in- built flexibility to step-up / step-down the quantum of limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall obtain
security documents covering the outer limit sanctioned to the exporters for such
longer period.
enriched_requirements.object: the outer limit sanctioned to the exporters for such longer period

conditions: In case of export of seasonal commodities
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of export of seasonal commodities, agro-based products, etc., the bank
shall sanction Peak / Non-peak credit facilities to exporters.
enriched_requirements.object: credit facilities to exporters

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall permit interchangeability of pre-shipment and post- shipment
credit limits.
enriched_requirements.object: and post- shipment credit limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Assessment of export credit limits shall be 'need based' and not directly linked
to the availability of collateral security.
enriched_requirements.object: not directly linked to the availability of collateral security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
As long as the requirement of credit limit is
justified on the basis of the exporter's performance and track record, the credit
shall not be denied merely on the grounds of non-availability of collateral security.
enriched_requirements.object: the grounds of non-availability of collateral security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Waiver of submission of orders or LCs for availing pre-shipment credit
The bank shall waive, ab initio, submission of order / LC in respect of exporters
with good track record and put in place the system of obtaining periodical
statement of outstanding orders / LCs on hand.
enriched_requirements.object: of order / LC in respect of exporters with good track record and put in place the system of obtaining periodical statemen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be incorporated in
the sanction proposals as well as in the sanction letters issued to exporters and
appropriately brought to the notice of ECGC.
enriched_requirements.object: sanction proposals as well as in the sanction letters issued to exporters and appropriately brought to the notice of ECGC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
